thinking.text: The user is happy with the EcoCard recommendation and is going to apply for it. They're thanking me and seem satisfied with the help. I should acknowledge their decision, wish them well with the application, and let them know I'm here if they need anything else.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome! 🎉

The EcoCard really does seem like a great fit for your crypto trading needs — that 1.0% foreign transaction fee and virtual card management will give you the flexibility and security you're looking for on international exchanges.

A few quick tips as you apply:
- Have your personal and financial details ready (ID, income info)
- After approval, set up virtual cards for your online crypto purchases to keep your primary card number secure
- Consider enrolling in autopay to avoid that $32.50 late payment fee

Good luck with your application! If you have any questions down the road or need help with anything else, I'm here to assist. Happy trading! 🚀
